hints: Start by copying the roster: result = roster.copy(). If you skip this step, your changes will affect the caller's original list.
To add each name, loop over to_add and call result.append(name) each time.
Before removing a name, check it's actually there: if name in result: result.remove(name). Calling .remove() on a missing value raises ValueError.
Return sorted(result) — not result.sort(). The .sort() method returns None, not the sorted list.
